best_for: 中电联模板下的正式汇报、项目方案、技术分享、阶段性成果汇报和政企材料正文页
visual_direction: clean modern professional deck, calm government-enterprise reporting, structured evidence-driven layout, light background with crisp hierarchy, restrained technical texture

canvas.background: warm white #FFFFFF, light gray #F8FAFC, or very pale blue #F6F9FF
canvas.composition: structured content zone, evidence/diagram zone, concise takeaway zone
canvas.density: medium information density with enough breathing room for formal reporting

color_palette.accent: soft amber #F59E0B only for highlights and risk/attention notes
color_palette.neutral: slate gray #475569, light border #E2E8F0, pale card background #F8FAFC
color_palette.rule: use restrained professional colors; avoid playful neon, luxury gold, heavy dark backgrounds, blue-purple glow, or marketing-style gradients

typography.title: clear bold modern Chinese sans-serif, report-like and authoritative
typography.body: clean modern Chinese sans-serif, left-aligned when possible, stable hierarchy
typography.labels: small but readable labels for timeline, evidence, metrics, and process diagrams
typography.text_quality: Chinese text must be exact, readable, and suitable for formal reporting

font_rules: 中文文字采用接近微软雅黑特征的现代中文无衬线风格，字形端正清晰，笔画均匀，结构略圆润，字面宽度适中偏宽，字距自然，行距宽松稳定。
标题可适度加粗，但不得过粗、过硬、过窄、过度压缩或形成厚重黑块感；正文采用常规字重，保持清晰、舒展、稳健的阅读效果。
文字不得密排、贴边、挤压、溢出，不得使用过窄行高。常规文字容器应保留充足留白，左右内边距不低于10%，上下内边距不低于8%，模块标题区和正文内容区均应避免文字过满。
正文模块标题约 14–16pt，标签约 11–12pt，辅助说明约 9–10pt；文字需要水平清晰、左对齐优先，同列元素严格对齐。
layout_patterns: technical architecture diagram with key takeaways
summary dashboard with achievements, issues, learnings, and plan
policy / platform / capability / market relationship map
layout_usage_rule: Use layout_blueprints as candidate starting points only. Choose and adapt the composition according to each slide's semantic role; avoid repeating the same blueprint on adjacent slides unless it is a deliberate repeated sequence.

visual_elements.allowed: timeline, checklist, progress bars, architecture blocks, process arrows, evidence cards, metric badges, issue/risk callouts, code-like panels, simple icons, low-saturation semantic mini-illustrations
visual_elements.avoid: overly decorative poster layout, random stock photos, cute stickers, dense unreadable tables, exaggerated marketing style

rendering_constraints: The image must look suitable for a real China Electricity Council formal reporting deck.
Prioritize clarity, evidence, logical flow, and professional restraint over decoration.
All diagrams and labels should feel purposeful and related to the slide content.
